SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model

Class Model

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model.Model
public class Model extends Object
Represents an SMT model.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Model()
    creates an empty SMT model

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addAliases()
    For all values it adds the names of the constants which have the same values.

    returns true if the model is empty

    set of objects the specified object points to
    String
    processAnyValue(String val)
    Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.
    void
    processArrayValues()
    Transforms the values of array fields of objects from binary/hexidecimal to human readable form.
    void
    processConstantsAndFieldValues()
    Transforms the values of constants and object fields from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable from.
    String
    processConstantValue(String val, SMTSort s)
    Transforms a constant value from binary/hexadecimal form to a human redable form.
    void
    processObjectNames()
    Rewrite the object names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.
    void
    processSequenceNames()
    Rewrite the sequence names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.
    void
    processSeqValues()
    Transforms values of sequences from binary/hexadecimal to human readable form
    static String
    removePipes(String s)
    removes the pipe character at the start and end from the given string
    void
    removeUnnecessaryObjects()
    cleans up maps from unused/unnecessary objects
    void
    setEmpty(boolean empty)
    marks the model as empty or full
    void
    setTypes(ProblemTypeInformation types)

      public Model()
      creates an empty SMT model

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      returns true if the model is empty
      Returns:
      true if the model is empty

    • setEmpty

      public void setEmpty(boolean empty)
      marks the model as empty or full
      Parameters:
      empty - indicates model status

    • getConstants

      public Map<String,String> getConstants()
      returns map from constant names to constant values
      Returns:
      map from constant names to constant values

    • processObjectNames

      public void processObjectNames()
      Rewrite the object names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.

      public void processSequenceNames()
      Rewrite the sequence names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.

      public void setTypes(ProblemTypeInformation types)
      Parameters:
      types - the types to set

    • addConstant

      public void addConstant(String key, String value)
      Adds a constant to the model.
      Parameters:
      key - the constant name
      value - the constant value

    • addHeap

      public void addHeap(Heap e)
      Adds a heap to the model.
      Parameters:
      e - The heap to be added

    • addLocationSet

      public void addLocationSet(LocationSet e)
      Adds a location set to the model.
      Parameters:
      e - The location set to be added.

    • addSequence

      public void addSequence(Sequence s)
      Adds a sequence set to the model.
      Parameters:
      s - The sequence to be added.

    • processConstantValue

      public String processConstantValue(String val, SMTSort s)
      Transforms a constant value from binary/hexadecimal form to a human redable form.
      Parameters:
      val - binary/hexadecimal value of constant
      s - sort of constant
      Returns:
      human readable form #sn with s the first letter of the sort of the constant, and n the decimal value of the constant

    • processAnyValue

      public String processAnyValue(String val)
      Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.
      Parameters:
      val - the original any value in binary/hexadecimal
      Returns:
      the formatted value

    • processArrayValues

      public void processArrayValues()
      Transforms the values of array fields of objects from binary/hexidecimal to human readable form.

    • processSeqValues

      public void processSeqValues()
      Transforms values of sequences from binary/hexadecimal to human readable form

    • addAliases

      public void addAliases()
      For all values it adds the names of the constants which have the same values.

    • getNecessaryPrestateObjects

      public Set<ObjectVal> getNecessaryPrestateObjects(String location)
      returns set of necessary prestate objects
      Parameters:
      location -
      Returns:
      set of necessary prestate objects

    • findObject

      public ObjectVal findObject(String ref)
      finds the object the ref parameter is referring to
      Parameters:
      ref - the reference to the object
      Returns:
      the object the ref parameter is referring to or null otherwise

    • removeUnnecessaryObjects

      public void removeUnnecessaryObjects()
      cleans up maps from unused/unnecessary objects

    • getReachableObjects

      public Set<ObjectVal> getReachableObjects(String name, Heap heap)
      returns all objects reachable from the specified one in the fiven heap
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the object from where to look
      heap - the heap
      Returns:
      set of reachable objects

    • pointsTo

      public Set<ObjectVal> pointsTo(String name, Heap heap)
      set of objects the specified object points to
      Parameters:
      name - the source object
      heap - the heap
      Returns:
      set of objects the specified object points to

    • getObject

      public ObjectVal getObject(String name, Heap heap)
      returns the object of the given name found in the heap
      Parameters:
      name - the object to look up
      heap - the heap
      Returns:
      the object of the given name found in the heap

    • removePipes

      public static String removePipes(String s)
      removes the pipe character at the start and end from the given string
      Parameters:
      s - the String to process
      Returns:
      String identical to the parameter except with pipe characters at the start and end removed

    • processConstantsAndFieldValues

      public void processConstantsAndFieldValues()
      Transforms the values of constants and object fields from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable from.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      returns a string representation of this SMT model
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      string representation of the model for debugging purposes
